name: dashboard-analytics
description: Analytics dashboard with stats cards, line charts, activity feed, and summary grid
author: AD AI Engine
instructions:
1. Import components into your dashboard page
2. Pass data props to each component
3. Use SummaryGrid as the layout wrapper for StatsCards
4. LineChart accepts an array of { label, value } data points
5. ActivityFeed accepts an array of activity items with timestamp, user, and action
